title: VEVOX® FFP3 Dust Mask - Set of 10 - Valved Face Masks - Respirator - Protection e.g. for Construction, Sanding, Spray Painting, Cleaning, Mould, Fine Dusts or Asbestos Particles
features: TESTED AND CERTIFIED - Our FFP3 masks are CE & UKCA certified according to norm EN149:2001+A1:2009. The demanding test procedure was carried out by the prestigious EU notified & UKCA approved body CCQS with the official NB2834 & AB1105 designations.

EXCEPTIONALLY COMFORTABLE - With its Comfort Plus Sealing and sophisticated membrane valve exhalation technology for easier breathing, our FFP3 facemask is surprisingly comfortable to wear - especially during prolonged use.

MOST EFFECTIVE FILTRATION - The innovative multi-layer filtration system of our ffp3 respirator filters at least 99% of all particles & aerosols up to 0.6μm from the air you breathe. Protect your respiratory tract with the most advanced filter tech!

RELIABLE SEALING - With its individually adjustable Elastic Pro head straps, its adjustable double wire nosepiece & its comfort plus sealing, our FFP 3 grade mask insulates at least 95% of the air your breath. And it does so for all face shapes.
